ksa_text: Implement model monitoring and observability systems, including performance dashboards, drift detection, degradation alerting, incident response procedures, and automated retraining triggers when defined thresholds are exceeded.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of network systems management principles, models, methods (e.g., end-to-end systems performance monitoring), and tools.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of continuous monitoring tools and techniques

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-004 (AI, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4520 is insufficient to establish relevance to analytics and business intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (onet=0.452, nist_ai_rmf=0.414, ddat=0.411) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4520 below threshold for weak fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-T-004 (composite 0.4520) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4520 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Data Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.4520 is not a standard requirement for Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4520, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
